title: Implement dependencies in Python
description: Implement dependencies.py: add/remove deps, build dependency graph, detect_cycles() with DFS, ready_query().
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implemented Python dependencies: new taskulus/dependencies.py with add/remove/list-ready, cycle detection, and dependency validation. Wired CLI commands: tsk dep add/remove and tsk ready. Added unit tests (test_dependencies.py) and CLI error-path tests; dependencies module at 100% coverage locally.
